deep_dive.title: SeFi-Image: A Text-to-Image Foundation Model with Semantic-First Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: Training image generation foundation models consumes substantial resources. Previous methods have attempted to leverage semantic guidance to accelerate the training process, yet their experiments were only conducted on simple datasets such as ImageNet, at low resolutions, and with small-scale models. In this paper, we propose SeFi-Image, a text-to-image foundation model built upon semantic-first diffusion, a novel latent diffusion modeling paradigm. We instantiate SeFi-Image at three model scales, 1B, 2B, and 5B parameters, enabling systematic study of scaling behavior and flexible deployment under varying compute budgets. Notably, our largest 5B model was trained with merely 125K A800 GPU hours, corresponding to roughly 10-20% of the training compute used by Z-Image. However, it achieves results comparable to or even superior to Qwen-Image and Z-Image. Despite this modest training compute, SeFi-Image achieves strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, including GenEval, DPG, LongTextBench, OneIG, and CVTG-2K. Moreover, we provide DMD2-distilled few-step turbo variants for each model scale to accommodate diverse hardware constraints and latency requirements. We publicly release our code, weights and hope this work offers the community useful insights into semantic-guided diffusion modeling for T2I generation, while also providing practical and readily deployable model options.

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SeFi-Image proposes a semantic-first diffusion paradigm for text-to-image generation, achieving efficient training with 10-20% of typical compute.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对图像生成基础模型训练资源消耗巨大的问题，本文提出了语义优先扩散范式SeFi-Image。该方法在潜在扩散建模中优先利用语义信息指导训练，在1B、2B和5B三种规模上验证了扩展行为。最大5B模型仅需125K A800 GPU小时训练，约为传统方法的10-20%。这项工作展示了语义引导在加速扩散模型训练中的有效性。

deep_dive.title: NaviCache: Test-Time Self-Calibration Caching for Video Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) is constrained by immense computational costs. While offline calibration-based acceleration suffers from calibration data dependency, prohibitive calibration duration, and susceptibility to distribution shifts, offline calibration-free methods eliminate these hurdles. However, since they rely on instantaneous zero-order approximations where the mapping between input and output differences varies in real-time, they are susceptible to observational noise and ignore the intrinsic momentum within the diffusion trajectory. In this paper, we propose NaviCache, a plug-and-play test-time self-calibration method re-conceptualizing feature evolution as an Inertial Navigation System (INS) problem. NaviCache bridges the fundamental domain gap and the non-stationary nature of diffusion by modeling the relative coupling between input and output variations. We introduce a dual-state estimation architecture that adaptively tracks the feature change ratio and its latent drift, initialized via a specialized Initial Alignment phase. By integrating a time-dependent noise schedule with an uncertainty-aware Measurement Update mechanism, NaviCache provides a theoretically grounded mechanism for error-bounded computation skipping. Extensive experiments on the HunyuanVideo, Wan, and Open-Sora series demonstrate that NaviCache exhibits more accurate error judgment for computation skipping and achieves outstanding comprehensive performance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: test-time self-calibration caching for video diffusion without extra training
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 视频扩散的测试时自校准缓存，无需额外训练
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 视频扩散的测试时自校准缓存，无需额外训练
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 视频扩散的测试时自校准缓存，无需额外训练
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: NaviCache proposes a plug-and-play test-time self-calibration method for video diffusion models, treating feature evolution as an inertial navigation system to accelerate generation without training.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 视频扩散模型推理成本高昂，现有离线校准方法依赖数据且耗时，免校准方法则易受噪声影响。本文提出NaviCache，将特征演化重新构建为惯性导航系统问题，实现即插即用的测试时自校准缓存。该方法无需额外训练，能有效加速视频生成，在保持质量的同时降低计算开销。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 视频扩散模型推理成本高昂，现有离线校准方法依赖数据且耗时，免校准方法则易受噪声影响。本文提出NaviCache，将特征演化重新构建为惯性导航系统问题，实现即插即用的测试时自校准缓存。该方法无需额外训练，能有效加速视频生成，在保持质量的同时降低计算开销。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: How to improve diffusion model video generation without additional training?

deep_dive.title: Vera: A Layered Diffusion Model for Content-Preserving Video Editing
deep_dive.abstract: Video diffusion models have enabled remarkable progress in video generation and editing. However, content preservation remains a core challenge: existing methods regenerate every pixel and often alter elements that should remain unchanged, such as characters or background scenes. We introduce Vera, a layered diffusion framework for content-preserving video editing. Instead of regenerating the entire video, Vera generates an edit layer along with an alpha matte for compositing with the source video, separating creative editing from content preservation by design. To encourage coherent composition with the source video, we extend the text-to-video DiT into a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture, with separate DiTs for each layer that interact through joint self-attention. To support the training of Vera, we further construct a high-quality layered dataset with accurate alpha mattes, diverse scenes and dynamics, and visual effects. Across our quantitative benchmark and human preference study, Vera outperforms leading open-source video editing models in content preservation while remaining competitive in edit quality, using 486K frames of layered training data.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Video generation using diffusion models; content-preserving video editing
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用扩散模型进行视频生成；内容保持的视频编辑
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用扩散模型进行视频生成；内容保持的视频编辑
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用扩散模型进行视频生成；内容保持的视频编辑
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Vera introduces a layered diffusion framework for content-preserving video editing, using a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture to generate an edit layer composited with the source video.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频编辑中内容保持的难题，Vera提出一种分层扩散模型，生成独立的编辑层与alpha遮罩，与源视频合成。采用混合变换器架构（MoT）实现层间交互，避免重新生成整个视频。在多个基准上实验表明，Vera在保持人物和背景不变的同时实现了高质量的视频编辑效果，显著优于现有方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对视频编辑中内容保持的难题，Vera提出一种分层扩散模型，生成独立的编辑层与alpha遮罩，与源视频合成。采用混合变换器架构（MoT）实现层间交互，避免重新生成整个视频。在多个基准上实验表明，Vera在保持人物和背景不变的同时实现了高质量的视频编辑效果，显著优于现有方法。

quick_skim.title: Don't Settle at the Mode! Mitigating Diversity Collapse in Pretrained Flow Models via Feature Self-Guidance
quick_skim.abstract: State-of-the-art flow models generate stunning images from text or image prompts. However, they suffer from diversity collapse when generating multiple samples under the same conditioning. Existing methods address this issue via either latent guidance, which has limited effectiveness, or sample selection, which relies on external reward models that incur significant inference-time overhead. In this work, we introduce an efficient, training-free self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse without requiring additional reward models. Specifically, we disperse the internal features of the flow model during batch generation with feature self-guidance. Further, to keep the features close to the manifold, we introduce a manifold regularization step that projects these dispersed features back onto the data manifold, ensuring diverse generation without sacrificing alignment with the input conditions. Our method integrates seamlessly as a plug-and-play module into pretrained flow models, adding only a marginal inference cost. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements in diversity while preserving fidelity across several conditional flow models, including multi-step and few-step text-to-image, depth-to-image, and reference image generation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Training-free diversity enhancement for flow models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 流模型的免训练多样性增强
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 流模型的免训练多样性增强
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 流模型的免训练多样性增强
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Don't Settle at the Mode introduces a training-free feature self-guidance mechanism to mitigate diversity collapse in flow models without reward models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 流模型在相同条件下生成多样本时存在多样性崩溃问题。本文提出免训练的特征自引导机制，在批量生成中分散内部特征，同时保持流形接近。无需额外奖励模型，有效提升多样性。
